candidate_id.description: Id of the candidate (person) this employment entry belongs to.

company_name.description: Free-text name of the employer, as entered on the candidate's profile.

title.description: Free-text job title held at this employer.

start_date.description: Start date of this employment, as an ISO 8601 date. The Greenhouse UI displays only the month and year.

end_date.description: End date of this employment, as an ISO 8601 date. `null` indicates the employment is current (ongoing). The Greenhouse UI displays only the month and year.

latest.description: `true` when this is the candidate's most recent employment. Greenhouse maintains this flag automatically — the current job (`end_date: null`) wins, otherwise the entry with the latest `end_date` — and at most one employment per candidate has `latest: true`. Mirrors the `company` and `title` shown on the parent candidate record.

description: Schema for the 'candidate_employments' stream, linked to the '/v3/candidate_employments' endpoint.
